com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface ITEResponse

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    IntegerTEResponse, TEResponse

    public interface ITEResponse
    Response for the question asked by the test execution. This interface has multiple implementations, depending on the value contained in the response.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      byte[] getEncodedResult()
      Returns the encoded result in the format defined by encoding getEncoding()
      java.lang.String getEncoding()
      Returns the encoding used for ITEResponse The encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
      Status getStatus()
      Returns the status of this response.

    • Method Detail

      • getStatus

        Status getStatus()
        Returns the status of this response.
        Returns:
        status

      • getEncoding

        java.lang.String getEncoding()
        Returns the encoding used for ITEResponse The encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
        Returns:
        encoding

      • getEncodedResult

        byte[] getEncodedResult()
        Returns the encoded result in the format defined by encoding getEncoding()
        Returns:
        encodedResult
